message:
feat(analytics,tui): replace stubs with honest implementations — headless asciicast sentinel, timeseries source-filter fallback, and doc-comment accuracy sweep

Truthfulness sweep replacing placeholder behavior and stale comments
with real implementations across three feature areas:

**Headless asciicast sentinel (lib.rs, tui tests):**
Renamed write_headless_asciicast_stub to write_headless_asciicast_sentinel.
The vacuous empty-frame output is replaced with a labeled sentinel cast
carrying cass_artifact_kind, recording_available: false, and a
human-readable explanation frame. Updated CLI help text for --asciicast
to describe headless behavior. New unit tests assert sentinel is
non-empty and properly labeled.

**Analytics tokens timeseries source-filter fix (query.rs, tests):**
Added query_track_a_timeseries_from_raw — a raw-message fallback that
fires when filtering by remote/specific source and rollup tables lack
reliable provenance (blank source_id with origin_host as fallback).
Added track_a_timeseries_requires_source_fallback predicate to gate
the new path. Updated render_analytics_docs to document messages and
message_metrics as valid source_table values. New CLI integration test
for the source-filter fallback path.

**Stale comment/doc-comment cleanup (encryption.rs, lib.rs, tests):**
Replaced "placeholder implementation" doc-comment on encrypt_content()
with accurate production description. Removed "deferred to child beads /
not yet implemented" comment on run_analytics dispatcher. Updated
--from-file test error messages to no longer say "unimplemented". Added
robot_docs_analytics_describes_safe_fix_mode test asserting docs don't
claim --fix is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
